title: Coworking Email Marketing Tools Review: Top 5 Platforms Comparison 2026
description: Review Mailchimp, Sendinblue, HubSpot Email and other email marketing tools. Compare member marketing, renewal reminders, event promotion, and email automation capabilities. Discover features and pricing comparisons to find your perfect solution! Expert reviews help you decide!
content:
Value of Email Marketing in Coworking Member Operations

Coworking member lifecycle requires precise communication: onboarding welcome, renewal reminders, event promotion, service updates, satisfaction surveys, churn intervention. Email marketing is the most efficient reach channel. 2026 data shows coworking spaces using email marketing tools improve member renewal rates by 25%, event participation rates by 40%, member satisfaction by 20%, and marketing efficiency by 60%.

Excellent email marketing tools should possess: email templates, member list management, automated emails, renewal reminders, event promotion, satisfaction surveys, email analytics, mobile management, API integration, and compliance management. Deep reviews focus on these core capabilities.

Top 5 Email Marketing Tools Deep Review

Mailchimp: Global Leading Email Marketing Platform

Mailchimp is a globally leading email marketing platform, covering email design, sending, and analysis across the entire process.

Core Features:

  • Email Templates: Template library and custom template design
  • Member Lists: Member list management, groups and tags
  • Automated Emails: Welcome emails, renewal reminders, birthday emails and other automated workflows
  • Event Promotion: Event email design and sending
  • Satisfaction Surveys: In-email survey forms
  • Email Analytics: Open rate, click rate, conversion rate analysis
  • A/B Testing: Email content A/B testing optimization
  • Mobile: Mobile email management
  • Integration: API integration with CRM and booking systems

Pricing: Free version supports 500 subscribers, paid version starting at $11/month.

User Reviews: Excellent email design experience, comprehensive automation features. Suitable for operators who value email marketing.

Sendinblue (Brevo): Multi-channel Marketing Platform

Sendinblue (now Brevo) is a multi-channel marketing platform, covering email, SMS, and chat.

Core Features:

  • Email Templates: Email template library and design
  • Member Lists: Member list management
  • Automated Emails: Automated marketing workflows
  • SMS Marketing: SMS sending and reminders
  • Event Promotion: Email and SMS event promotion
  • Email Analytics: Email reports and analysis
  • Integration: Integration with CRM systems

Pricing: Free version supports 300 emails/day, paid version starting at $25/month.

User Reviews: Good multi-channel marketing experience, SMS marketing complements email. Suitable for operators needing SMS reminders.

HubSpot Email: CRM-driven Email Marketing

HubSpot email marketing is deeply integrated with CRM, member data drives precise marketing.

Core Features:

  • Email Templates: Email template design
  • Member Lists: Associated with HubSpot CRM member lists
  • Automated Emails: CRM-driven automated email workflows
  • Renewal Reminders: Automated renewal emails based on member lifecycle
  • Event Promotion: Event email marketing
  • Email Analytics: Email reports and CRM data association
  • Integration: Deep integration with HubSpot CRM

Pricing: Free version basic features, paid version $45/month.

User Reviews: Best CRM integration, suitable for operators using HubSpot CRM. However, email design is less flexible than Mailchimp.

Constant Contact: Small-scale Email Marketing Platform

Constant Contact is suitable for lightweight email marketing in small coworking spaces.

Core Features:

  • Email Templates: Email template library
  • Member Lists: Member list management
  • Automated Emails: Basic automation
  • Event Promotion: Event emails
  • Email Analytics: Basic reports
  • Integration: Basic integration

Pricing: Starting at $12/month.

User Reviews: Lightweight and easy to use, suitable for small spaces. However, automation and CRM features are less advanced than Mailchimp and HubSpot.

ConvertKit: Creator Email Marketing Platform

ConvertKit is known for automation, suitable for precise member marketing.

Core Features:

  • Email Templates: Simple email design
  • Member Lists: Member tags and groups
  • Automated Emails: Powerful automation workflows, renewal reminders, churn intervention
  • Event Promotion: Event emails
  • Email Analytics: Email reports
  • Integration: API integration

Pricing: Free version supports 300 subscribers, paid version $15/month.

User Reviews: Powerful automation features, suitable for precise marketing. However, email design is less advanced than Mailchimp.

Email Marketing Tools Comparison Table

Member ListsExcellentGoodExcellent (CRM)GoodGood

PricingFree-$11Free-$25Free-$45$12+Free-$15
Best ScenarioEmail DesignMulti-channelCRM-drivenSmall SpacesAutomation

Selection Recommendations: Match Email Marketing Depth and CRM Needs

Emphasize Email Design: Recommend Mailchimp. Rich email templates, excellent design experience, suitable for brand email marketing.

Need SMS Marketing: Recommend Sendinblue. Email + SMS multi-channel marketing, suitable for operators needing SMS reminders.

CRM-driven Marketing: Recommend HubSpot Email. Deep integration with HubSpot CRM, member data drives precise marketing.

Small Spaces: Recommend Constant Contact. Lightweight and easy to use, moderate cost.

Emphasize Automation: Recommend ConvertKit. Powerful automation features, suitable for precise renewal reminders and churn intervention.

2026 Email Marketing Development Trends Prediction

Trend 1: CRM-driven Email Marketing. Email marketing will be deeply integrated with CRM, member lifecycle data driving email content and timing.

Trend 2: Automated Email Upgrade. Renewal reminders, churn intervention, and event recommendations will be fully automated, reducing manual intervention.

Trend 3: Email Personalization. Email content customized based on member preferences, behavior, and consumption history, improving open and conversion rates.

Trend 4: Email + SMS Multi-channel. Important reminders will use email + SMS dual-channel reach, improving reach and response rates.

Trend 5: Deepened Email Data Analysis. Email open rates, click rates, and conversion rates will be associated with member behavior data, optimizing marketing strategies.

Trend 6: Strengthened Compliance Management. GDPR compliance and member privacy protection will become essential email marketing capabilities.

When selecting email marketing tools, prioritize CRM integration and automation capabilities. Mailchimp suits email design, HubSpot suits CRM-driven, ConvertKit suits automation, Sendinblue suits multi-channel.
author: pSEO Agent
